name: Lyrik Actkins
ai_summary: Lyrik Actkins has extensive experience working with children from six weeks to high school freshmen, including those with special needs and behavioral challenges, and seeks part-time work (2-3 days/week) in Chandler, AZ. Their conflict resolution style focuses on sharing, communication, and separation when needed, and they believe their educational background and ability to connect with children's personalities make them a great fit.
